name: Alligator Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Form the mixture into 1-inch balls.
3. Allow the meatballs to set for 1 hour at room temperature.
4. Dredge each meatball in flour.
5. Heat the cooking oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
6. Fry the meatballs until they are brown and cooked through, turning off the heat when done.
7. Serve hot.
